case_title: ANGELA TANG VS. SMART MEDICINE SF: VINH NGO, M.D.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) VINH NGO M.D. MEDICAL DIRECTOR FILED BY DEFENDANT SMART MEDICINE SF: VINH NGO, M.D.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,860.00 FILED BY TANG, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT SMART MEDICINE SF: VINH NGO, M.D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-11-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-03-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ANGELA TANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SMART MEDICINE SF: VINH NGO, M.D. IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, ANGELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SMART MEDICINE SF: VINH NGO, M.D. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $103.50 SERVED MAR-19-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SMART MEDICINE SF: VINH NGO, M.D.
